event: View of Bro Church, Gotland, Sweden
symbols: church tower with pointed spire — the aspiration of faith pointing heavenward
stone boundary wall — the sacred precinct set apart from the world
gothic arched doorway — the entrance to sacred space
description: A photograph of a medieval stone church with a square tower topped by a pointed spire. The church has limestone walls and an orange-red tile roof. The entrance features pointed Gothic arches, and the tower has paired arched window openings. A low stone wall with rough-hewn rocks encloses the churchyard in the foreground. Green grass and a large deciduous tree frame the right side. The sky is overcast. The architecture is typical of medieval Gotland churches, simple and sturdy.
